sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Coda Octopus Group, Inc.'s (NASDAQ:CODA) 32% Jump Shows Its Popularity With Investors
feed.summary: Coda Octopus Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CODA) recently saw its share price jump 32% in a month, reflecting strong investor sentiment and recovering from prior weakness. The company's high P/E ratio of 39.3x, compared to the market average, is attributed to its superior earnings growth and a projected 43% EPS increase in the coming year, significantly outpacing the general market forecast. This suggests investors expect continued strong performance, justifying the higher valuation.

feed.title: Parsons buys defense tech firm Altamira for $375M to boost national security portfolio
feed.summary: Parsons Corp. has acquired Altamira Technologies for $375 million, marking its fourth acquisition in less than a year. This strategic move adds approximately 600 defense and intelligence industry professionals to Parsons' team, significantly boosting its national security portfolio. The acquisition underscores Parsons' ongoing expansion in the defense technology sector.

feed.title: BlackRock's Jewell Says Strong Earnings to Boost European Stocks

feed.title: FHN Q4 Deep Dive: Loan Growth and Deposit Discipline Drive Outperformance
feed.summary: First Horizon (FHN) exceeded Wall Street's revenue and profit expectations in Q4 CY2025, driven by disciplined deposit cost management, expanded lending, and strong commercial and industrial loan performance. The company’s CEO highlighted increased pre-provision net revenue and a 15% return on tangible common equity for 2025. Looking ahead, FHN anticipates mid-single-digit loan growth, prudent expense management, and continued investments in technology and client relations to sustain profitability.

feed.title: Palo Alto’s Firewall Firewall: New DoS Flaw Echoes Prior Zero-Day Chaos
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has released patches for a high-severity denial-of-service (DoS) vulnerability (CVE-2026-0227) in its GlobalProtect gateways and portals, which could allow unauthenticated attackers to crash firewalls. This flaw is concerning as it closely mirrors a previous zero-day exploit (CVE-2025-0114) that caused widespread outages. The vulnerability has a proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit circulating, urging immediate updates for enterprise users heavily reliant on GlobalProtect for remote access.

feed.title: Blalock Williams LLC Buys New Position in Eli Lilly and Company $LLY

Eli Lilly reported strong Q3 earnings, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations, and provided positive FY2025 guidance. Despite growth catalysts like an AI drug-discovery lab with Nvidia and positive analyst coverage, the company faces near-term risks including a GLP-1 lawsuit and an FDA delay for its oral obesity pill.

feed.title: Getty Realty Corp. Announces 2025 Dividend Tax Treatment
feed.summary: Getty Realty Corp. (NYSE: GTY) has announced the tax allocations for its 2025 dividend distributions on common stock, as they will be reported on Form 1099-DIV. Getty Realty Corp. advises shareholders to consult their own tax advisors for specific tax planning and analysis.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical stock rating downgraded by RBC Capital on weak demand
feed.summary: RBC Capital has downgraded Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) from Outperform to Sector Perform and reduced its price target to $70.00 from $74.00, citing weak demand for durables and sustainable products, limited organic growth, and capital expenditure opportunities. The firm also adjusted its 2026 EBITDA forecast for the company downward. This ratings change follows Eastman Chemical's recent Q3 2025 earnings report, which saw slight misses on both EPS and revenue, though the company did announce a dividend increase.

feed.title: Coastal Bend LNG Appoints KBR and TécnicasReunidas for FEED and EPC of Texas Export Facility
feed.summary: Coastal Bend LNG has chosen KBR, Inc. and TécnicasReunidas to handle the front-end engineering and design (FEED) for its proposed natural gas liquefaction and export terminal on the Texas Gulf Coast. This collaboration is set to deliver a highly efficient facility with competitive economics and a reduced carbon footprint, leveraging both companies' expertise in LNG development and decarbonization technologies. Subject to a positive final investment decision, the two firms will also conduct the engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC) phase of the project, focusing on cost-efficient LNG production and reduced greenhouse gas emissions.

feed.title: The Bull Case For PNC (PNC) Could Change Following Early Debt Redemption And Dividend Decisions
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group recently redeemed $3 billion in senior notes ahead of maturity and affirmed its common dividend, signaling shifts in its balance sheet and operations. This move necessitates evaluating how the funding change impacts the bank's existing investment narrative, particularly concerning net interest income sensitivity and capital markets volatility. Investors should monitor how PNC manages its funding mix and revenue expansion to sustain margins, especially if deposit balances or interest rates fluctuate.

feed.title: Upgrade Your Winter Cooking with These Williams Sonoma Picks—All on Sale Right Now

feed.title: Eastman Chemical stock rating downgraded by RBC Capital on weak demand
feed.summary: RBC Capital has downgraded Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) from Outperform to Sector Perform and reduced its price target from $74.00 to $70.00, citing weak demand for durables and sustainable products, limited organic growth, and capital expenditure opportunities. The firm also lowered its 2026 EBITDA forecast for the company. This downgrade follows Eastman Chemical's recent third-quarter 2025 earnings which missed analyst forecasts for both EPS and revenue, though the company did announce a slight increase in its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Lantern Pharma to Set Up AI Center of Excellence in Bengaluru to Scale RADR Platform
feed.summary: Lantern Pharma Inc. is establishing an AI Center of Excellence and Advanced Agentic Labs in Bengaluru, India, to expand its global AI and computational drug development capabilities. The center will industrialize its proprietary RADR® platform, focusing on scaling oncology programs initially and later extending to inflammation, immunology, and neurodegenerative diseases. This expansion aims to meet growing demand from pharmaceutical and academic partners worldwide and is expected to be cash flow neutral with initial operational impact by Q1 2026.
